summary: Verified Iter195 'Piece Definition' fields on Create Manufactured Product. Backend POST /api/manufactured-products correctly accepts and persists piece_def_value (float) and piece_def_unit (str). Frontend dialog shows the amber 'create-piece-definition-box' conditionally exactly as expected: HIDDEN when piece_weight_unit is a real weight unit (default غرام) and VISIBLE when a count-based unit (قطعة) is picked; both create-piece-def-value and create-piece-def-unit inputs render and accept input. Final UI submission could not complete in this preview env because the manufacturing inventory has zero raw materials (Recipe required) — backend curl path is already proven to work.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking [data-testid='tab-manufacturing'] via Playwright real mouse click and keyboard ArrowLeft both fail to switch the tab (data-state stays 'inactive'); only dispatching synthetic PointerEvents via JS works. This indicates the Radix TabsTrigger may be missing pointer-events handling or is blocked by an overlay in some layouts. Real users seem unaffected, but it's worth verifying there is no stacking-context/pointer-events issue.

action_items: (Optional) Investigate why TabsTrigger [data-testid='tab-manufacturing'] click does not switch tab via standard mouse click in headless Chromium; check for overlay or pointer-events: none on the trigger.
Seed minimal raw material in manufacturing inventory to allow end-to-end UI happy-path test of product creation (currently inventory empty).
critical_code_review_comments: WarehouseManufacturing.js is >7800 lines — strongly recommend splitting into smaller feature modules (createProductDialog, editRecipeDialog, transfers, requests).
Tab switching reliability: consider adding explicit onClick on TabsTrigger (in addition to Radix's value handling) for resilience under automation.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (conditional box + inputs verified; full submit blocked by empty inventory, not by feature)

seed_data_creation: Backend test creates and deletes TEST_pd_* products; no manual seed required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter195 feature (piece_def_value/unit on Create dialog) is verified working at both backend persistence layer (test_piece_def_create_iter195.py - 2/2 passed) and frontend conditional rendering. End-to-end UI submit was not completed because manufacturing inventory has no raw materials in this preview env (recipe ingredient required). To run the full UI happy-path test, seed at least one raw material into manufacturingInventory or transfer one from المخزن first.
rca of the issue: N/A - feature is working as designed.
